_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Leaf
author: admin@disasterlimited.tech
description: LeafMC - performant fork of Paper focused on balancing performance, vanilla mechanics, and stability.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Leaf Installation Script
#
# Server Files: /mnt/server
# API docs: https://api.leafmc.one/docs/swagger-ui/index.html
PROJECT=leaf
USER_AGENT="Pterodactyl (https://Pterodactyl.io)"
API_BASE="https://api.leafmc.one/v2/projects/${PROJECT}"

if [ -n "${DL_PATH}" ]; then
	echo -e "Using supplied download url: ${DL_PATH}"
	DOWNLOAD_URL=`eval echo $(echo ${DL_PATH} | sed -e 's/{{/${/g' -e 's/}}/}/g')`
else
	VERSIONS_JSON=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s ${API_BASE}`
	VER_EXISTS=`echo ${VERSIONS_JSON} | jq -r --arg VERSION "$VERSION" '.versions | index($VERSION) != null'`
	LATEST_VERSION=`echo ${VERSIONS_JSON} | jq -r '.versions[-1]'`

	if [ "${VER_EXISTS}" == "true" ]; then
		echo -e "Version is valid. Using version ${VERSION}"
	else
		echo -e "Specified version not found. Defaulting to the latest ${PROJECT} version"
		VERSION=${LATEST_VERSION}
	fi

	# NOTE: the builds list lives under /versions/{version}/builds, and each
	# entry is an OBJECT ({"build": <number>, ...}), not a bare number.
	BUILDS_JSON=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s ${API_BASE}/versions/${VERSION}/builds`
	BUILD_EXISTS=`echo ${BUILDS_JSON} | jq -r --arg BUILD "$BUILD_NUMBER" '[.builds[].build] | index($BUILD | tonumber) != null'`
	LATEST_BUILD=`echo ${BUILDS_JSON} | jq -r '.builds[-1].build'`

	if [ "${BUILD_EXISTS}" == "true" ]; then
		echo -e "Build is valid for version ${VERSION}. Using build ${BUILD_NUMBER}"
	else
		echo -e "Using the latest ${PROJECT} build for version ${VERSION}"
		BUILD_NUMBER=${LATEST_BUILD}
	fi

	echo "Version being downloaded"
	echo -e "Project: ${PROJECT}"
	echo -e "MC Version: ${VERSION}"
	echo -e "Build: ${BUILD_NUMBER}"

	# NOTE: the runnable jar is under .downloads.primary.name, not
	# .downloads.application.name (that key does not exist in the v2 API).
	JAR_NAME=`curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}" -s ${API_BASE}/versions/${VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER} | jq -r '.downloads.primary.name'`
	DOWNLOAD_URL="${API_BASE}/versions/${VERSION}/builds/${BUILD_NUMBER}/downloads/${JAR_NAME}"
fi

cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Running curl --user-agent \"${USER_AGENT}\"  -o ${MAINFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ -f ${MAINFILE} ]; then
	mv ${MAINFILE} ${MAINFILE}.old
fi

curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}"  -o ${MAINFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}

if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
    echo -e "Downloading MC server.properties"
    curl --user-agent "${USER_AGENT}"  -o server.properties https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pterodactyl/game-eggs/main/minecraft/java/server.properties
fi

variables.name: JAR file name
variables.description: The name of the .jar file that the server should run.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version the server should run on. Leave as latest to always use the newest version.

variables.name: Build Number
variables.description: The LeafMC build number for the selected version. Leave as latest to use the newest build.
